chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1728 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on CMA No.8584/2025 2. For hearing of main case 07.05.2025 Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Jamil Ahmed, Additional Commissioner-IR LTO, Karachi Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record. Learned counsel for respondent and Mr. Jamil Ahmed, Additional Commissioner-IR LTO, Karachi, state that pursuant to the amendment in the law the appeal pending before the Commissioner Appeals-II, Inland Revenue Karachi, is being transferred to the learned Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue Karachi. They further state that until the adjudication thereof the respondent department shall not take any coercive measures for recovery of the impugned demand covered by this petition. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with the representation and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
